content: [action] Phase 8 dispatch: ConvNeXt #1005 (LayerScale src/ addition + stem bias + naming remap + Linear/Conv1×1 reshape) + DeepLabV3 #1006 (pure naming state_remap). Both follow ViT #999 remap pattern. ASPP branch-order verification mandatory. Existing 11 PASSes must preserve.
